surfaces.glass_card: bg-[rgba(255,255,255,0.04)] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#BAFB00] text-black hover:bg-[#A3E635] rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 transition-colors
surfaces.button_glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors

xp_ring.description: SVG circle with stroke-dasharray/stroke-dashoffset based on progress, stroke color #BAFB00, drop-shadow [0_0_15px_#BAFB00]

stat_tiles.content: Large numeric value (Outfit font) with small label (JetBrains Mono)

sidebar.style: fixed h-screen border-r border-white/10 bg-[#050505] hidden md:flex flex-col

images.description: Night running scene, acts as the silhouette background for the hero section.
Mountain climbing scene, serves as the right panel background for the auth shell split screen.

icons.usage: Use consistently across the app. No emojis.

rules.gradients: Do not use generic gradients. Use flat colors or subtle noise/grain textures. Neon drop shadows allowed only on XP/levels.
rules.alignment: Left-aligned hero section, asymmetric stat tiles.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
